title: Missing Text guessing game
wikitext:
[]: Missing Text guessing game Post by Neil-T » Tue Apr 19, 2016 7:29 am Anyone fancy a game for fun? There's a book out called Essential Evangelion Chronicle: Side A, but it has some mistakes. One page has some text about Rei that's partly hidden under a picture, so it ends up as: Though she is generally quiet and rarely [missing text] freely in Gendoh's [missing text]

[]: Rei in rhythm Post by Neil-T » Tue May 10, 2016 4:17 am Or how about... < VERSUS > Though she is generally quiet and rarely gets the chance to bust out her awesome moves, Rei's performance was praised freely in Gendoh's top secret report on the rhythm game from episode 9.

[]: Flatulent Fuyutsuki?! Post by Neil-T » Tue May 24, 2016 4:34 am Or how about this one? Though she is generally quiet and rarely spreads gossip, Rei once heard that Fuyutsuki breaks wind freely in Gendoh's office while playing shogi.

[]: My impurest heart for you Post by Neil-T » Sat Jun 04, 2016 6:52 am Though she is generally quiet and rarely shows off her full wardrobe, Rei does that quite freely in Gendoh's self-penned ecchi fanfiction manga ‘Cosplay Rei: Beyond the uniform’.

[]: Re: Missing Text guessing game Post by NemZ » Sat Jun 04, 2016 5:36 pm Clearly this is going nowhere.
